message:
feat(python): numpy.asfortranarray wrapper parity (franken_numpy-4zx7)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.asfortranarray(a, dtype=None)
so the result is always a Fortran-contiguous (column-major) ndarray.
Test covers C-order 2-D copied to F-order with F_CONTIGUOUS flag
verified, already-F-order pass-through, explicit dtype promotion,
1-D input (trivially F-contig), and Python list to F-ordered ndarray.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
